findings.worker_claim: Add size limit and tag element validation to parseNut10Secret
findings.evidence: Implementation is correct and tests pass (278/278), but commit f916aa2 introduced a TypeScript strict-mode error: src/conditions.ts line 38 — parameter 't' in the rawTags.filter callback implicitly has type 'any' (TS7006). The filter logic itself is correct (Array.isArray(t) && t.every(e => typeof e === 'string')), it just needs an explicit type annotation like (t: unknown). npm run typecheck fails.
findings.fix_needed: Add explicit type annotation to filter parameter: (t: unknown) instead of (t)

findings.evidence: src/middleware/express.ts (96 lines) implements real middleware factory. Uses structural typing for Express types (no hard dependency). 6 tests in express.test.ts. Exported from src/index.ts. express added as optional peerDependency.
src/middleware/fastify.ts (87 lines) implements preHandler hook factory with dual-path verification (L402 + X-Cashu). Uses structural typing. 6 tests. Exported from src/index.ts.

findings.worker_claim: Sanitize external strings in onLog context to prevent log injection (CWE-117)
findings.evidence: sanitizeLogValue(v, maxLen=500) added, truncates and strips control chars. Applied to 3 onLog call sites. JSDoc warning added to LogEntry in src/types.ts.

findings.worker_claim: Sanitize verbose invoice error to prevent budget leakage (CWE-209)
findings.evidence: Error message changed from exposing maxCostSats to generic 'L402 invoice exceeds maximum allowed cost'. 3 test assertions updated.
Early-exit length guard before timingSafeEqual removed. try/catch handles RangeError from buffer length mismatch. Regression test added.

findings.worker_claim: Replace parseInt || undefined with explicit NaN/range check in detectConditions
findings.evidence: locktime now uses !Number.isNaN(v) && v >= 0 (preserves 0). n_sigs uses !Number.isNaN(v) && v >= 1 (rejects 0). 4 new tests.

findings.worker_claim: Add nonce to bridge L402 preimage to prevent replay attacks (CWE-330)
findings.evidence: Preimage HMAC input changed from 'bridge:secretsDigest' to 'bridge:identifier:secretsDigest' where identifier is randomBytes(16). 6 new tests.

findings.worker_claim: Align CLAUDE.md macaroon HMAC description with actual single-blob implementation
findings.evidence: CLAUDE.md updated to describe single-blob HMAC. JSDoc NOTE added to signMacaroon in l402-server.ts. Docs-only change as specified.

new_tasks.title: Fix implicit 'any' type in parseNut10Secret tag filter (TS7006)
new_tasks.description: Commit f916aa2 (task 012) introduced a TypeScript strict-mode error at src/conditions.ts:38 — the parameter 't' in rawTags.filter((t): t is string[] => ...) implicitly has type 'any'. Fix: change to (t: unknown): t is string[]. This causes npm run typecheck to fail.

context.summary: 8/9 tasks fully verified. 1 partial (task 012 — correct implementation but introduced a TypeScript strict-mode error). All 278 tests pass. Typecheck fails due to implicit 'any' in conditions.ts:38. No fakes, stubs, TODOs, FIXMEs, or console.logs found. All implementations are substantive and match their task specs.
